title: BlueMarvel
description:
Blue Marvel Aka Adam Brashear 
(A Superhero addon for Palladium)
body:
Here we have a Palladium Addon Based off of Marvel Superhero Blue Marvel

Made by Avi(me)

Join Discord for Updates and more to come

https://discord.gg/5DxD7PYZVg

How to become living AntiMatter Reactor 
Craft AntiMatter bomb (Recipe Below) be careful....

Strength system implemented the higher the stage and the older you are the stronger you get and the longer your abilities will last it also determines what abilities get unlocked  
You have a good amount of abilities
Flight
Super speed
Super strength
SuperJump
Supersonic flight
Supersonic Punch
AntiMatter Fullbody infusion
AntiMatter Arm infusion
AntiMatter Eye Infusion
Concussive Eye beams 
Arm Energy rays 
forcefield
AntiMatter Explosion Intangibality
Fuse Intagibality and Explosion for Antimatter Augmented flight
Activating Full body infusion while flying grants a speed boost
infusion abilites grant strength, durability and a healing increase
Your antimatter explosion ability also lifesteals from any nearby foes for that extra oomf 
AntiMatter Constructs (axe,shovel,pickaxe,sword)
Ad astra compatibality Just hit Y 1000 
 
(Not Fully done visually check discord for whats missing, Gameplay features all implemented tho)
 
Two suits implemented more to come, heres one of their Crafting recipes(Equivalent to Diamond) 
![60s Helmet Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa7979e21ef244fe386de9a4a43c07ee27c8f30d.webp)
![60s chest Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd19697b1ce790f277f3fa696d153d8616e777a3.webp)
![60s legs Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49297efcbdf03ec36e4d14e5a6de0df5f45de49b.webp)
 ![60s boots Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46f8ee77ed5d6b2d6627caed9d0d569956d078c.webp)
 
Needed Dependacies
Kubejs
Geckolib
Palladium
Gravestone core
and whatever else they require
